name: @softagility/beacon-js
description: SoftAgility Beacon JavaScript/TypeScript SDK — track usage events, manage sessions, capture exceptions, and queue events offline. Browser + Node.

scripts.size: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),zlib=require('zlib');const b=fs.readFileSync('dist/beacon.esm.js');const g=zlib.gzipSync(b);const limit=8192;console.log('ESM gzipped:',g.length,'bytes ('+(g.length/1024).toFixed(2)+' KB)');if(g.length>limit){console.error('FAIL: exceeds '+(limit/1024)+' KB limit');process.exit(1)}else{console.log('PASS: under '+(limit/1024)+' KB limit ('+((limit-g.length)/1024).toFixed(2)+' KB headroom)')}"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run test && npm run size

author: SoftAgility
